calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing Termination Of Trust And Distribution Of Trust Assets; And Approval Of Accounting And Acts Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Authorizing Termination Of Trust And Distribution Of Trust Assets; And Approval Of Accounting And Acts Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eda Cole represented Mechanics Bank with Linnea Sosa aperaing on their behalf.

The Court is not in favor of terminating the Trust at this time. Ms. Cole stated that she has been trying to contact professionals but they are unwilling to take on the case. The Court wants Ms. Cole to keep trying to retain a private professional. The matter was continued to March 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on retaining a private professional.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
